scope: External scheduled public Radicle seed health check from ubuntu-work
actions_not_taken: no secret passphrase or Radicle key material was written to committed evidence
no retained maintainer key material was copied to the health-check host beyond its pre-existing retained maintainer lane
no paid infrastructure, wallet, spending, or direct outreach was introduced
no permanent durability, censorship-resistance, security, global-replication, identity-trust, default-routing, or production-readiness claim is made
claim_boundary: This records an enabled user-level systemd timer on ubuntu-work that runs the public Radicle seed health check against the openclaw seed and wrote a passing latest.json for commit ef16e2ad39d3e13bdcc9d454443c5bbb17733c68. It is monitoring evidence, not proof of durability, automatic repair, default public routing, security, identity trust, or production readiness.
